use_cases: Displaying proposal status with colored badges in a tracker interface
Showing progress indicators on project management dashboards
Filtering and categorizing proposals by status
Providing visual feedback on approval workflows
ai_summary: A minimalist proposal tracker card component with status badges and visual indicators. Built with shadcn/ui styling patterns, this component displays proposal progress and status information in a clean card layout. The Badge sub-component provides variant-based styling for different proposal states like pending, approved, or rejected.
